findings.title: Meta description length is in range
Exactly one H1
findings.detail: A new radical left is shaking up the Democratic party

findings.title: Heading levels skip a level
findings.detail: An H1 is followed by an H4.
findings.recommendation: Keep heading nesting sequential (no H2→H4 jumps).

findings.title: No x-default hreflang
findings.recommendation: Add rel=alternate hreflang="x-default" for the fallback URL.

findings.title: Dominant topics detected
findings.detail: monde (29), subscribers (20), france (14), french (13), articles (12), sign (9)  ·  phrases: world cup, united states, min read

findings.title: No Organization/WebSite entity
findings.detail: No site-level Organization or WebSite markup detected.
findings.recommendation: Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD (typically sitewide) to establish the publishing entity.

findings.title: Few question-based headings
findings.detail: 0 of 8 subheadings are phrased as questions.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite key H2/H3s as the questions users actually ask — AI engines match answers to question-shaped headings. (Most useful on article/guide pages; lower priority here.)

findings.title: No direct answer up top
findings.detail: The opening doesn't state a concise answer/definition.
findings.recommendation: Lead with a 1–2 sentence direct answer before the details; AI overviews lift the top summary.

findings.title: AI crawlers are blocked in robots.txt
findings.detail: Disallowed from the site root: ClaudeBot (Anthropic (Claude)), Claude-Web (Anthropic (Claude on-demand)), Google-Extended (Google (Gemini / AI Overviews training)), CCBot (Common Crawl (feeds many LLMs)), Bytespider (ByteDance).
findings.recommendation: If you want visibility in AI answers, allow these agents. If the block is intentional (content protection), ignore this.
findings.evidence: ClaudeBot (Anthropic (Claude)), Claude-Web (Anthropic (Claude on-demand)), Google-Extended (Google (Gemini / AI Overviews training)), CCBot (Common Crawl (feeds many LLMs)), Bytespider (ByteDance)

findings.title: Title and H1 don't share terms
findings.detail: The <title> and <h1> have no words in common.
findings.recommendation: Align them on the core entity so engines get one clear topic signal.

findings.title: Images without width/height attributes
findings.recommendation: Add width/height (or CSS aspect-ratio) so the browser reserves space — prevents layout shift (CLS).
